description.lt: Burnos higienos paslauga atliekama klinikoje kaip dantu gydymo prieziuros dalis.
description.en: Oral hygiene service provided in the clinic as part of dental care.

description.lt: Dantu implantavimo paslaugos, iskaitant skirtingas implantu sistemas pagal klinikos teikiama informacija.
description.en: Dental implant services, including different implant systems listed by the clinic.

description.lt: Ortodontinio gydymo paslaugos, iskaitant dantu tiesinima breketais ir kapomis.
description.en: Orthodontic treatment services, including teeth alignment with braces and aligners.
